checklist.text: Specification DOCX assembled in USPTO section order for review.
checklist.evidence: docs/legal/SCBE_NONPROVISIONAL_SPEC_v1.docx and patent-workbench/assembled/SCBE_NONPROVISIONAL_SPEC_DRAFT_v1.docx. 399 paragraphs, ~70 KB, 28 claims, 9 figures per local manifest.

checklist.text: Spec section order verified against USPTO 8-section order.
checklist.evidence: Audited assembled MD 2026-05-28: line 1 Title, line 3 Cross-Reference (63/961,403 cited), line 7 Background, line 41 Summary, line 51 Brief Description of Drawings, line 71 Detailed Description, line 1126 Claims, line 1338 Abstract. All 8 required sections present in correct order.

checklist.text: Priority claim to provisional 63/961,403 present in spec and ADS draft.
checklist.evidence: Cross-Reference section in assembled spec (line 3) cites 63/961,403, filed 2026-01-15. ADS draft at patent-workbench/ADS_PTO_AIA_14_DRAFT.md Section 4 contains domestic benefit claim under 35 U.S.C. 119(e). Must be entered in Patent Center ADS fields at filing.

checklist.text: Independent and total claim counts checked for fee impact.
checklist.evidence: 28 total claims, 3 independent (claims 1, 9, 15), 25 dependent, 0 multiple-dependent. Micro-entity fees: $70 filing + $154 search + $176 exam = $400 base; 8 extra claims (21-28) x $40 = $320; total $720. Claims 27-28 added 2026-05-28: claim 27 (harmonic phase orthogonality, depends on 4), claim 28 (domain-specific entropy encoding, depends on 26). Claims 4 and 26 also enriched with semantic-domain and Cartesian-product language. No paper surcharge, no non-DOCX surcharge, no multiple-dependent surcharge.

checklist.text: Fixed claims v3 produced with all inaccuracies resolved and production-unclaimed features added.
checklist.evidence: PATENT_CLAIMS_FIXED_v3.md created 2026-05-28. Claim 1 whereby clause rewritten (bounded exponential pi^(phi*d*), not superexponential; distance from centroid not proximity to boundary). Claim 3 adds species (iii) pi^(phi*d). Claim 21 reformulated from 5-predicate to N-predicate >=3 tracking actual 3-ring sacred_eggs.py. Claim 23 REPLACED EMA tau formula (archive only) with REROUTE 5th-decision-mode (production _check_reroute + DEFAULT_REROUTES). Claim 24 REPLACED Hopfield quadratic form (archive only) with null-space anomaly detection (production _null_space_anomaly lines 807-835). All other claims retained verbatim. CIP deferred items documented in v3 section 'What Has Been Deferred'. Fee updated to $720 after adding claims 26-28. NEXT: apply claim 1 whereby-clause fix to spec DOCX claims section before filing.

checklist.text: Claim 1 formula language verified against _harmonic_cost implementation and corrected.
checklist.evidence: Audited runtime_gate.py _harmonic_cost lines 889-899: cost = PI^(PHI * d_star) where d_star = min(weighted_dist, 5.0), PHI=1.618, PI=pi. This is a BOUNDED EXPONENTIAL (cost at d*=0 is 1.0, at d*=1 is ~5.05, at d*=5 is ~9,070). It is NOT superexponential. Claim 1 'whereby' clause corrected in PATENT_CLAIMS_FIXED_v3.md to read 'follows a function of the form B^(k*d)... increases monotonically as the embedded point deviates from the session centroid'. Spec DOCX claims section must be updated to match before filing (see spec_docx_whereby_updated).

checklist.text: Spec DOCX claim 1 whereby clause updated to match fixed claims v3.
checklist.evidence: Applied 2026-05-28. build_patent_docx.py CLAIMS array updated: claim 1 whereby -> B^(k*d) bounded-exponential language; claim 3 adds species (iii) pi^(phi*d); claim 21 N-predicate >=3 (semantic/geometric/crypto); claim 23 REROUTE replacing EMA tau; claim 24 null-space anomaly replacing Hopfield. SCBE_NONPROVISIONAL_SPEC_v1.docx rebuilt and committed (a4f5167cf). Assembled MD also updated.

checklist.text: Micro entity eligibility re-verified at filing; PTO/SB/15A current.
checklist.evidence: PTO/SB/15A signed ~2026-03-02 per prior email record (Gmail msg 19cb262145405494). Must re-verify on filing day: <=4 prior U.S. utility/design/plant apps as inventor, gross income below USPTO threshold (~$258K FY2026), no large-entity assignment obligation. Provisional filings do not count toward the 4-application limit.

checklist.text: Drawings FIG 1-9 cover each feature claimed in independent claims.
checklist.evidence: FIG_1 through FIG_9 PNG files confirmed present 2026-05-28. Brief Description updated: FIG.1 now explicitly mentions four-way ALLOW/QUARANTINE/DENY/REROUTE output and fail-to-noise path; FIG.3 now explicitly mentions session centroid as trusted reference region and hyperbolic distance arc. Coverage map: Poincare embedding → FIG.3; session centroid → FIG.3; hyperbolic distance → FIG.3; nonlinear cost variants → FIG.2; four-way decision → FIG.1; fail-to-noise → FIG.1; Sacred Egg predicates → FIG.5; tongue weights + harmonic ratios + phase offsets → FIG.4; PQC dual-lattice consensus → FIG.6. Gap noted: bijective tamper detection (claims 15-20) lacks a dedicated figure but is covered by detailed pseudocode in the spec body — not a fatal defect.

checklist.text: Every claim element mapped to written-description support in spec.
checklist.evidence: Claims 1-28 mapped. Claims 1-22 and 25-28 have code-level or design support in PATENT_CLAIMS_FIXED_v3.md. REROUTE (claim 23) and null-space anomaly (claim 24) now explicitly described in PATENT_DETAILED_DESCRIPTION.md: REROUTE added after Layer 13 ESCALATE paragraph (five-tier variant, two-signal confirmation, reroute table, separate severity path); null-space anomaly added as Stage 0 in Section 9 (coordinate clustering check, uniformity threshold, anomaly score fed into composite risk). Both confirmed present in rebuilt SCBE_NONPROVISIONAL_SPEC_v1.docx (REROUTE coverage True, null-space coverage True). Still a risk that provisional 63/961,403 does not cover claims 23/24 -- these receive the non-provisional filing date not Jan 15 2026 priority during examination.

checklist.text: Post-2026-01-15 improvements separated from provisional-supported material.
checklist.evidence: CIP analysis complete in PATENT_CLAIMS_FIXED_v3.md 'What Has Been Deferred to CIP' section. Deferred: EMA swarm trust formula (archive only), Hopfield energy exact form (archive only), trichromatic governance (opt-in only), Tree of Escalation as decider (observational only), full 14-layer ordered composition claim, Sacred Tongues tokenizer (separate invention). Claims 21-28 in the fixed set are grounded in production code/design support or accepted as getting non-provisional date. Decision: include all 28 claims and accept that 21/23/24 receive the non-provisional filing date (not Jan 15, 2026 priority date) unless the provisional covers them — USPTO assigns the earliest supported date per claim during examination.

checklist.text: Prior-art search log completed and IDS decision made.
checklist.evidence: Search executed 2026-05-28. Three Google Patents/Justia/arXiv queries: (1) hyperbolic geometry/Poincare ball + security authorization, (2) hyperbolic embedding + authentication/access control, (3) semantic weighting/golden ratio/bijective token + security governance. 8 results logged in prior_art_search_log.md. IDS DECISION: no filing required. No result found that directly anticipates the combination of Poincare-ball embedding + session centroid + exponential cost function + four-way governance decision. Closest: US12561561 (user vector embeddings for access control) uses flat embedding spaces only. Run remaining 6 planned queries if prosecution history estoppel becomes a concern during examination.

checklist.text: Non-publication request decision made.
checklist.evidence: Decision 2026-05-28: NO non-publication request. Application publishes normally ~18 months after earliest priority date (2027-07-15). Rationale: SCBE has international applicability (South Korea, EU); PCT/foreign filing remains possible; requesting non-publication then filing foreign triggers strict USPTO consequences that are easy to mishandle pro se. Do NOT check the non-publication box in Patent Center.

checklist.text: Benchmark/test evidence packet prepared for prosecution support.
checklist.evidence: resonant_thought_lattice_benchmark.json shows baseline_mean=0.615 vs lattice_mean=0.9163, delta=0.3013, 7/8 improved. This supports utility and non-obviousness arguments. Optional: package Petri gate recall results (97.7% after KO gate) as informal evidence. Not filed with application but used during examination responses.

checklist.text: Source-code appendix/pseudocode decision made.
checklist.evidence: Decision 2026-05-28: NO source-code appendix. The Detailed Description contains sufficient pseudocode inline for all claimed elements (tanh projection, centroid update, hyperbolic distance arcosh formula, harmonic cost pi^(phi*d*), fail-to-noise, reroute table, null-space anomaly, sacred egg predicates, bijective token formula). Filing source code creates prior-art publication risk and is not required. Pseudocode in spec is sufficient.

checklist.text: Inventor/applicant ownership posture confirmed.
checklist.evidence: Decision 2026-05-28: Ownership 100% inventor (Issac Daniel Davis). SAM.gov UEI J4NXHM6N5F59 shows sole proprietor. No university affiliation, no employer, no funded research contract. No assignment record required at filing — can be recorded later if an investor or acquirer needs it. No assignment document to prepare.

checklist.text: Broad claim fallbacks and continuation/CIP strategy identified.
checklist.evidence: Strategy finalized in PATENT_CLAIMS_FIXED_v3.md. Filing all 28 claims now, accepting non-provisional date for claims 21/23/24 (which were reformulated to track production code not in original provisional). CIP candidates documented: EMA tau swarm trust, Hopfield energy exact form, trichromatic 10D governance, Tree of Escalation as decider, broader Sacred Tongues tokenizer family as a possible separate application beyond dependent claims 26-28. CIP must be filed before this application issues — track USPTO status after filing.

Common failures: non-Times-New-Roman font, line spacing, margins, page numbers in wrong location. Tool is at patentcenter.uspto.gov > Tools > DOCX Validator. Run AFTER applying spec_docx_whereby_updated fixes.

checklist.text: USPTO fees verified on filing day.
checklist.evidence: Verified 2026-05-28 against live USPTO fee schedule (uspto.gov/learning-and-resources/fees-and-payment/uspto-fee-schedule). Confirmed micro-entity rates: basic filing 1.16(a) $70, search 1.16(k) $154, examination 1.16(o) $176, each claim over 20 1.16(i) $40. 28 claims = 8 excess x $40 = $320 extra. Total: $720. Re-verify on actual filing day in case schedule changes.
